# Event studies

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "arrow", "here", "dplyr", "DIDmultiplegtDYN", "ggplot2"
)

# Function to install missing packages
install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
  for (pkg in packages) {
    if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
      cat("Installing", pkg, "...\n")
      install.packages(pkg, lib = user_lib)
    }
    library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}

# Install and load packages
install_if_missing(required_packages)
```


```{r}
# Binary
# Function to run event study models with flexible parameters
run_bin_event_study <- function(param_grid, rad = 2000, overwrite = FALSE) {
  # Path for results files
  results_path <- here("book", "book_regs", paste0("binary_did_results_", rad, ".rds"))
  partial_path <- here("book", "book_regs", paste0("binary_did_results_partial_", rad, ".rds"))

  # Create directory if it doesn't exist
  results_dir <- dirname(results_path)
  if (!dir.exists(results_dir)) {
    dir.create(results_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    message("Created directory: ", results_dir)
  }

  if (overwrite) {
    # Start with empty results list if overwriting
    binary_did_results <- list()
  } else {
    # Load existing results if not overwriting and file exists
    if (file.exists(results_path)) {
      binary_did_results <- readRDS(results_path)
    } else {
      binary_did_results <- list()
      message("No existing results file found. Creating new results list.")
    }
  }

  # Load the dataset
  dat_panel_site <- open_dataset(
    here::here("data", "processed", "dat_panel_site_mo")
  ) %>%
    filter(radius == rad) %>%
    collect()

  # Define a function for running binary did_multiplegt_dyn with common parameters
  run_binary_did_model <- function(outcome,
                                   treatment_var,
                                   normalized,
                                   same_switchers) {
    model <- try(did_multiplegt_dyn(
      df = dat_panel_site,
      outcome = outcome,
      group = "site_id",
      time = "month_id",
      treatment = treatment_var,
      effects = 12,
      placebo = 3,
      cluster = "site_id",
      normalized = normalized,
      trends_lin = FALSE,
      same_switchers = same_switchers,
      less_conservative_se = TRUE,
      graph_off = FALSE
    ), silent = FALSE)
    return(model)
  }

  # Calculate total number of models
  total_models <- nrow(param_grid)

  # Run the models
  try({
    cat("Starting model estimation - total models:", total_models, "\n")

    for (i in 1:nrow(param_grid)) {
      # Extract parameters
      outcome <- param_grid$outcome[i]
      treatment_threshold <- param_grid$treatment_threshold[i]
      time_agg <- param_grid$time_agg[i]
      normalized <- param_grid$normalized[i]
      same_switchers <- param_grid$same_switchers[i]
      treatment_type <- param_grid$treatment_type[i]

      # Construct the treatment variable name dynamically (CORRECTED ORDER)
      treatment_var <- paste0("treated_", treatment_type, "_", treatment_threshold, "_", time_agg)

      # Build model name
      outcome_suffix <- ifelse(outcome == "log_price_median_w", "_logpw", "_logp")
      treat_type_suffix <- ifelse(treatment_type == "spill_count", "_sc", "_sh")
      threshold_suffix <- paste0("_", treatment_threshold)
      time_agg_suffix <- paste0("_", time_agg)
      sw_suffix <- if (same_switchers) "_sw" else ""
      norm_suffix <- if (normalized) "_norm" else ""
      model_name <- paste0(
        "model_bin", # Base name
        outcome_suffix, # _logp or _logpw
        treat_type_suffix, # _sc or _sh
        threshold_suffix, # _mean, _p50, etc.
        time_agg_suffix, # _mo or _yr
        sw_suffix, # _sw (if TRUE)
        norm_suffix # _norm (if TRUE)
      )

      outcome_label <- case_when(
        outcome == "price_median_w" ~ "Weighted Price Median",
        outcome == "log_price_median_w" ~ "Weighted Log Price Median",
        outcome == "price_median" ~ "Price Median",
        outcome == "log_price_median" ~ "Log Price Median",
        TRUE ~ outcome
      )

      threshold_label <- case_when(
        treatment_threshold == "mean" ~ "Mean Threshold",
        treatment_threshold == "p50" ~ "P50 Threshold",
        treatment_threshold == "p75" ~ "P75 Threshold",
        treatment_threshold == "p90" ~ "P90 Threshold",
        treatment_threshold == "max" ~ "Max Threshold",
        TRUE ~ paste0(
          toupper(substr(treatment_threshold, 1, 1)),
          substr(treatment_threshold, 2, nchar(treatment_threshold)),
          " Threshold"
        )
      )

      time_agg_label <- ifelse(time_agg == "mo", "Monthly", "Yearly")

      treat_type_label <- ifelse(treatment_type == "spill_count", "Spill Count", "Spill Hours")

      norm_label <- ifelse(normalized, "Normalized", "Not Normalized")
      switchers_label <- ifelse(same_switchers, "Same Switchers", "All Switchers")

      model_description <- paste0(
        outcome_label, " ~ ", time_agg_label, " ", threshold_label, " ", treat_type_label, "; ",
        norm_label, ", ", switchers_label
      )

      # Check if model already exists in results (if not overwriting)
      if (!overwrite && model_name %in% names(binary_did_results)) {
        cat(sprintf("\n[%d/%d] Skipping model: %s (already exists)\n", i, total_models, model_name))
        next # Skip to next iteration
      }

      # Display progress information with description
      cat(sprintf(
        "\n[%d/%d] (%d%%)\n",
        i, total_models, round(i / total_models * 100)
      ))
      cat(sprintf("Running model: %s\n", model_name))
      cat(sprintf("Description: %s\n", model_description))

      # Run model using the constructed treatment variable name
      model <- run_binary_did_model(outcome, treatment_var, normalized, same_switchers)

      # Add to results list - even if it's an error
      binary_did_results[[model_name]] <- model

      # Also store the description with the model
      attr(binary_did_results[[model_name]], "description") <- model_description

      # Save intermediate results after each model (in case of later failure)
      try(saveRDS(binary_did_results, file = partial_path), silent = TRUE)

      # Print estimated progress
      cat(sprintf(
        "Progress: %d of %d models completed (%d%%)\n",
        i, total_models, round(i / total_models * 100)
      ))
    }
  })

  # Save the final results
  try(saveRDS(binary_did_results, file = results_path))

  if (overwrite) {
    cat("Models completed and saved (overwriting original file)\n")
  } else {
    cat("Models completed and saved (combined with existing results)\n")
  }

  cat("All models attempted - check results for any errors\n")

  # Return results invisibly (in case you want to use them in the session)
  return(binary_did_results)
}

binary_param_grid <- expand.grid(
  outcome = c("log_price_median", "log_price_median_w"),
  treatment_threshold = c("mean", "p50", "p75", "p90", "max"),
  time_agg = c("mo", "yr"),
  treatment_type = c("spill_count", "spill_hrs"),
  normalized = c(TRUE),
  same_switchers = c(TRUE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
run_bin_event_study(binary_param_grid, rad = 10000)
run_bin_event_study(binary_param_grid, rad = 5000)
run_bin_event_study(binary_param_grid, rad = 2000)
run_bin_event_study(binary_param_grid, rad = 1000)
run_bin_event_study(binary_param_grid, rad = 500)
run_bin_event_study(binary_param_grid, rad = 250)
```


```{r}
#| eval: false

# Continuous treatment
# Function to run event study models with flexible parameters
run_continuous_event_study <- function(param_grid, rad = 2000, overwrite = FALSE) {
  # Path for results files
  results_path <- here("book", "book_regs", paste0("cont_did_results_", rad, ".rds"))
  partial_path <- here("book", "book_regs", paste0("cont_did_results_partial_", rad, ".rds"))

  # Create directory if it doesn't exist
  results_dir <- dirname(results_path)
  if (!dir.exists(results_dir)) {
    dir.create(results_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    message("Created directory: ", results_dir)
  }

  if (overwrite) {
    # Start with empty results list if overwriting
    cont_did_results <- list()
  } else {
    # Load existing results if not overwriting and file exists
    if (file.exists(results_path)) {
      cont_did_results <- readRDS(results_path)
    } else {
      cont_did_results <- list()
      message("No existing results file found. Creating new results list.")
    }
  }

  # Load the dataset
  dat_panel_site <- open_dataset(
    here::here("data", "processed", "dat_panel_site_mo")
  ) %>%
    filter(radius == rad) %>%
    collect()

  # Define a function for running continuous did_multiplegt_dyn with common parameters
  run_continuous_did_model <- function(outcome,
                                       treatment_var,
                                       normalized,
                                       same_switchers) {
    model <- try(did_multiplegt_dyn(
      df = dat_panel_site,
      outcome = outcome,
      group = "site_id",
      time = "month_id",
      treatment = treatment_var,
      effects = 9,
      placebo = 2,
      cluster = "site_id",
      normalized = normalized,
      trends_lin = FALSE,
      same_switchers = same_switchers,
      less_conservative_se = TRUE,
      graph_off = FALSE,
      effects_equal = TRUE
    ), silent = TRUE)
    return(model)
  }

  # Calculate total number of models
  total_models <- nrow(param_grid)

  # Run the models
  try({
    cat("Starting continuous model estimation - total models:", total_models, "\n")

    for (i in 1:nrow(param_grid)) {
      # Extract parameters
      outcome <- param_grid$outcome[i]
      treatment_var <- param_grid$treatment[i]
      normalized <- param_grid$normalized[i]
      same_switchers <- param_grid$same_switchers[i]

      # Build model name
      outcome_suffix <- ifelse(outcome == "log_price_median_w", "_logpw", "_logp")
      treat_suffix <- case_when(
        treatment_var == "spill_count" ~ "_sc",
        treatment_var == "log_spill_count" ~ "_logsc",
        treatment_var == "spill_hrs" ~ "_sh",
        treatment_var == "log_spill_hrs" ~ "_logsh",
        TRUE ~ paste0("_", gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "", treatment_var))
      )
      sw_suffix <- if (same_switchers) "_sw" else ""
      norm_suffix <- if (normalized) "_norm" else ""
      model_name <- paste0(
        "model_cont", # Base name for continuous
        outcome_suffix, # _logp or _logpw
        treat_suffix, # _sc, _logsc, _sh, _logsh
        sw_suffix, # _sw (if TRUE)
        norm_suffix # _norm (if TRUE)
      )

      outcome_label <- case_when(
        outcome == "price_median_w" ~ "Weighted Price Median",
        outcome == "log_price_median_w" ~ "Weighted Log Price Median",
        outcome == "price_median" ~ "Price Median",
        outcome == "log_price_median" ~ "Log Price Median",
        TRUE ~ outcome
      )

      treatment_label <- case_when(
        treatment_var == "spill_count" ~ "Spill Count",
        treatment_var == "log_spill_count" ~ "Log Spill Count",
        treatment_var == "spill_hrs" ~ "Spill Hours",
        treatment_var == "log_spill_hrs" ~ "Log Spill Hours",
        TRUE ~ treatment_var
      )

      norm_label <- ifelse(normalized, "Normalized", "Not Normalized")
      switchers_label <- ifelse(same_switchers, "Same Switchers", "All Switchers")

      model_description <- paste0(
        outcome_label, " ~ ", treatment_label, " (Continuous); ",
        norm_label, ", ", switchers_label
      )

      # Check if model already exists (if not overwriting)
      if (!overwrite && model_name %in% names(cont_did_results)) {
        cat(sprintf("\n[%d/%d] Skipping model: %s (already exists)\n", i, total_models, model_name))
        next # Skip to next iteration
      }

      # Display progress information with description
      cat(sprintf(
        "\n[%d/%d] (%d%%)\n",
        i, total_models, round(i / total_models * 100)
      ))
      cat(sprintf("Running model: %s\n", model_name))
      cat(sprintf("Description: %s\n", model_description))

      # Run model
      model <- run_continuous_did_model(outcome, treatment_var, normalized, same_switchers)

      # Add to results list - even if it's an error
      cont_did_results[[model_name]] <- model

      # Also store the description with the model
      attr(cont_did_results[[model_name]], "description") <- model_description

      # Save intermediate results after each model (in case of later failure)
      try(saveRDS(cont_did_results, file = partial_path), silent = TRUE)

      # Print estimated progress
      cat(sprintf(
        "Progress: %d of %d models completed (%d%%)\n",
        i, total_models, round(i / total_models * 100)
      ))
    }
  })

  # Save the final results
  try(saveRDS(cont_did_results, file = results_path))

  if (overwrite) {
    cat("Models completed and saved (overwriting original file)\n")
  } else {
    cat("Models completed and saved (combined with existing results)\n")
  }

  cat("All continuous models attempted - check results for any errors\n")

  # Return results invisibly (in case you want to use them in the session)
  invisible(cont_did_results)
}

continuous_param_grid <- expand.grid(
  outcome = c("log_price_median", "log_price_median_w"),
  treatment = c("spill_count", "log_spill_count", "spill_hrs", "log_spill_hrs"),
  normalized = c(TRUE),
  same_switchers = c(TRUE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
run_continuous_event_study(continuous_param_grid, rad = 10000)
run_continuous_event_study(continuous_param_grid, rad = 5000)
run_continuous_event_study(continuous_param_grid, rad = 2000)
run_continuous_event_study(continuous_param_grid, rad = 1000)
run_continuous_event_study(continuous_param_grid, rad = 500)
run_continuous_event_study(continuous_param_grid, rad = 250)
```
